briefs.title: BC Food Premises and Pool Regulations Updated with Minor Housekeeping Amendments
briefs.summary: BC updated four public health regulations on October 27, 2025, making minor housekeeping changes. Key updates include renaming a federal agency reference to 'Indigenous Services Canada,' updating the Fish Act name, and requiring pools to post 9-1-1 (or local emergency numbers if 9-1-1 is unavailable) near the phone instead of the previous requirement.
briefs.action_required: If you operate a pool facility, check that 9-1-1 and required emergency numbers are posted visibly near your pool telephone.
